message:
Add PR formatting check

Run the Biome format check in GitHub Actions for pull requests so
formatting regressions fail CI before merge.

Keep the release workflow focused on publishing by adding a separate
CI workflow for validation.

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,28 @@
+name: CI
+
+on:
+  pull_request:
+  workflow_dispatch:
+
+permissions:
+  contents: read
+
+jobs:
+  format:
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+
+    steps:
+      - name: Checkout
+        uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - name: Setup Node.js
+        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
+        with:
+          node-version: "20"
+          cache: "npm"
+
+      - name: Install dependencies
+        run: npm ci
+
+      - name: Check formatting
+        run: npm run format:check
